subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad, Mahmoud, the Beloved! Now hath thy letter arrived, and it is the hour of sunset, and this pen, from the abundance of writing, doth falter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احمد محمود ودود الان مکتوب تو رسید و وقت غروبست و این قلم از کثرت تحریر سر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @wisdom [hikmat]
